title: About Impetigo
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Impetigo is usually a mild skin infection that can occur anywhere on the body.
It starts as a red, itchy sore and can spread to other areas.
Healthcare providers treat impetigo with antibiotics.
Patients should speak with a healthcare provider when they have concerns about impetigo.
